empty: Every accomplishment starts with the decision to try.
The secret of getting ahead is getting started.
A journey of a thousand miles begins with a single step.
You don't have to be great to start, but you have to start to be great.
The best time to start was yesterday. The next best time is now.
Small steps every day lead to big changes.
Start where you are. Use what you have. Do what you can.
The hardest part is beginning. Once you begin, the rest follows.
One task at a time is how mountains get moved.
Today is a blank page — write something good on it.
Discipline is choosing between what you want now and what you want most.
Your future is created by what you do today, not tomorrow.
inProgress: Keep going. Everything you need will come to you.
You're doing better than you think.
Half done is still ahead of not started.
Momentum builds with every task, no matter how small.
Success is the sum of small efforts repeated daily.
Don't stop now — you're closer than you were an hour ago.
Keep the pace, the finish line is real.
Every checked box is proof you can finish this.
It always seems impossible until it's done.
The middle is where most people quit — don't be most people.
You've already done the hard part: starting.
complete: Well done! You showed up for yourself today.
Every task complete — that's a great day's work.
You did what you set out to do. That matters.
Finished. Take a moment to feel good about that.
That's a wrap — nice work today.
You closed the loop. Well earned rest.
All done. Tomorrow is a fresh page.
Nothing left but the satisfaction of a job well done.
You showed up and finished. That's the whole game.
Clean slate, full checklist — enjoy it.
You kept your word to yourself today.
